objective: Add docstrings to the public test functions and fixtures flagged by the scanner in the core test modules: tests/test_agent_token_tracking.py, tests/test_registry.py, tests/test_agent_result.py, and tests/test_workspace_typing.py. Keep the docstrings short and descriptive, matching the intent of each assertion so the test suite satisfies the repository's module/docstring policy without changing test behavior.
commit_message: test: add docstrings to flagged core test functions
implementation_summary: Added short descriptive docstrings to the public fixtures and test functions flagged in tests/test_agent_token_tracking.py, tests/test_registry.py, tests/test_agent_result.py, and tests/test_workspace_typing.py without changing behavior. Verified with pytest on the four touched modules (18 passed).
